jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Unacademy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
